{{CargoRelic
|name=Theogony
|class_id=22158
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=11-21
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Nov 21, 700 BC, Hesiod completed his great work, which told the story of the gods.<br>Theogony, a narrative by the ancient Greek poet Hesiod, is divided into three parts: a prologue that pays tribute to the Muses, a main text that describes the creation and relationships of the gods, and an epilogue that explores the offspring of gods, demi-gods, and heroes, as well as the creation of related poems.
|fame=39
|art=52
|fth=74
|civ=36
|tech=42
|ss1=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12
|ss2=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +16
|ss3=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20
|ss4=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28
|ss5=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36
|ss7=Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per 30 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x B-tad Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Angel Cells gained +7.5%
}}
